session.user:
Run the following command and report the results: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py
Report all errors in full.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py
Run type checker on reconcile and land_learn commands

session.assistant:
ty passed: All type checks passed!
All three files passed type checking: - `src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py` - `src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py`
No errors were found.
